message:
🐛 Capture wheel events on terminal tiles to prevent page scroll (#140)

Wheel events on terminal containers were bubbling up to the page,
causing the page to scroll instead of letting xterm.js/tmux handle
mouse scroll. Add non-passive wheel event listeners on both tile
and single-mode containers that call preventDefault() to keep scroll
events within the terminal.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
